0.name: Autonomie-Recherche
0.notes: v2: BMAD-Methode, Context7, Sequential Thinking, ESLint, Design Patterns, Vitest, Tauri Plugin MCPs

1.name: Projektsetup
1.notes: MCPs: Context7, Sequential Thinking, ESLint. BMAD v6 global (9 Skills, 15 Commands). Agents: code-reviewer, tester. Skills: check-gate, update-progress, review-module. Hooks: PostEdit-Check, Stop-QualityGate. Rules: phasenmodell.md, rf-modell.md

2.name: Deep Dive & Lueckenanalyse
2.notes: 52 Wissensluecken identifiziert (22 HOCH, 19 MITTEL, 11 NIEDRIG). 10 Kategorien. 2 Widersprueche zwischen Dokumenten. Top-Prioritaet: AP-Zugriffsmethode (WL-AP-01), Tech-Stack-Entscheidungen, Canvas-Library, Heatmap-Performance.

3.name: Recherche & Evaluation
3.notes: 6 Recherche-Dokumente (6.681 Zeilen). Tech-Stack: Svelte 5 + Tauri 2 + Konva.js + rusqlite + Vitest + Biome. AP: Web-Interface-Scraping primaer, SNMP sekundaer. Heatmap: Konva.js + eigene ImageData + WebWorker. RF: 27 Wandmaterialien + 4 Decken. Messung: iPerf3 Sidecar + RSSI pro Plattform. Open-Source: flatten-js, simpleheat, paraglide-js empfohlen.

4.name: Klaerung mit Benutzer
4.notes: 19 Fragen geklaert. Kern: Mixing Console Forecast+Assist MVP, kein Paywall, Svelte5+Tauri2+Rust bestaetigt (mit PoC-Bedingung), macOS-first, Heatmap im Frontend Worker, 10-12 Materialien user-editierbar, Multi-Floor+6GHz in Datenstruktur vorbereiten

5.name: Architektur & Tech-Stack
5.notes: 4280 Zeilen: Architektur.md (Systemuebersicht, Frontend, Backend, IPC-API, Sicherheit) + Datenmodell.md (16 Tabellen, Seed-Daten, TypeScript/Rust-Typen, Undo/Redo)

6.name: Orchestrierungsstrategie
6.notes: 1074 Zeilen: Modell-Matrix, 6 Agenten-Rollen, Sub-Phasen-Plan, Quality Gates, Session-Management

7.name: Detailplanung
7.notes: 103 Tasks, 1412 Zeilen. Agenten und Skills fuer Phase 8 ueberarbeitet (code-reviewer, tester, run-tests Skill). ADR-Skill fuer Autonomie angepasst.

8a.name: Scaffolding + PoC
8a.notes: T-8a-01..09: Tauri2+Svelte5 Scaffolding, Biome, Vitest, 16 DB-Tabellen (3 Migrationen), Rust module stubs (commands, db, ap_control, measurement, export, platform), TypeScript types, i18n, SvelteKit routes

8b.name: Kernmodul Planung
8b.notes: T-8b-01..16: 14 neue Backend-Commands (CRUD+Batch), N+1 fix, FrequencyBand Enum. Frontend: Layout, Stores (Svelte 5 Runes), Canvas Editor, WallDrawingTool, APMarker, MaterialPicker, AutoSave, GridOverlay. Code-Review: 5 CRITICAL + 23 WARNING behoben.

8c.name: Kernmodul Heatmap
8c.notes: T-8c-01..12: RF-Engine extrahiert (ITU-R P.1238, RFConfig), Spatial-Grid extrahiert (1m Zellen, Segment-Intersection), Worker refactored (imports). HeatmapManager mit 4 LOD-Stufen (1.0/0.5/0.25/0.1m). HeatmapOverlay + HeatmapControls + SignalLegend. 123 Tests (RF, SpatialGrid, ColorSchemes). Code-Review: 2 CRITICAL + 6 WARNING behoben.

8d.name: Modul Messung
8d.notes: T-8d-01..10: iPerf3 Sidecar (TCP up/down, UDP, validate_server_ip), WiFi-Scanner macOS (airport CLI, RSSI/noise/BSSID/SSID/channel), RF-Kalibrierung (Grid Search coarse+fine, RMSE, R², wall_correction, confidence), 8 Tauri Commands, DB measurement.rs CRUD, MeasurementStore (Svelte 5 Runes), API Layer, MeasurementWizard (4-Schritt), ServerSetup, RunOverview, MeasurementProgress, ResultCard, CalibrationResult, MeasurementPoints Konva (quality-colors, run-shapes), Measure Page Layout. Code-Review: 3 CRITICAL + 10 WARNING behoben. 208 Tests (85 neu).

decisions.description: Mixing Console MVP: Forecast-Only + Assist-Mode Apply
Tech-Stack: Svelte 5 + Tauri 2 + Rust + Konva.js + rusqlite + Vitest + Biome (mit PoC-Bedingung)
Heatmap-Berechnung im Frontend (TypeScript + Web Worker), Progressive Render
Multi-Floor in Datenstruktur, UI nur 1 Floor MVP
6 GHz in Datenstruktur, UI nur 2.4+5 GHz MVP
DAP-X2810 + Custom AP Profil, Assist-Steps fuer Custom
